title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 209.307 - Conflict of interest for board or evaluation team, effect
text:
209.307.  Conflict of interest for board or evaluation team, effect. — Any member of the board or an evaluation team who has a conflict of interest that may have a direct effect on an evaluation shall excuse himself or herself from the evaluation.  The remaining members shall assess that individual's performance.
(L. 1994 S.B. 568 § 6 subsec. 7, A.L. 2018 S.B. 843)
